name: I fell off a scaffold at a construction site in Salt Lake City—what do I do right now?

mainEntity.name: I fell off a scaffold at a construction site in Salt Lake City—what do I do right now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report the injury to your supervisor immediately and seek medical care. Document the equipment and scene with photos, then contact a workers comp attorney to protect your right to medical benefits and lost wages.
